Terms & Conditions

Last updated: June 6, 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using this website, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use this website.

2. Real Estate Services

Sven Skarie is a licensed real estate professional in Maryland, affiliated with LPT Realty. Information on this website is for general informational purposes and does not constitute legal, financial, or professional real estate advice specific to your situation.

3. Communications Consent

By submitting any form on this website and providing your phone number, you consent to receive calls and text messages, including automated messages and AI-assisted communications, from Move With Sven regarding real estate inquiries, market updates, property information, and related services. Message and data rates may apply. Reply STOP to opt out of SMS communications.

4. Accuracy of Information

While we strive to provide accurate and up-to-date information, real estate market data, property information, and market conditions change frequently. We make no warranties regarding the accuracy or completeness of information on this site.

5. Intellectual Property

All content on this website, including text, images, logos, and design, is the property of Move With Sven or its licensors. Unauthorized use is prohibited.

6. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, Move With Sven shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of this website or reliance on any information provided herein.

7. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of Maryland. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Maryland.

8. Contact

Questions about these Terms? Contact us:
